"Visitor Guidelines" mein darshaya gaya hai ki visitors ko niyamit samay par aana chahiye, apni pehchan dikhani zaroori hai, aur safety rules ka palan karna hoga. "Check-In Desk" par visitors apni entry register karwayein aur staff ki madad lein. Dono sections mein suraksha aur vyavastha par zor diya gaya hai.

Document mein "Visitor Guidelines" diye gaye hain jo aane wale logon ke liye niyam aur suvidhaon ko batate hain. Iske baad "Check-In Desk" ka zikr hai jahan par visitors apna registration karwate hain.

Document mein pehle "Visitor Guidelines" diye gaye hain, jismein visitors ke liye basic rules aur instructions mention hain. Uske baad "Check-In Desk" section aata hai, jahan par check-in process aur related information di gayi hai.

Document mein "Account Settings" sabse pehle diya gaya hai, uske baad "Password Reset" mention hai.

Document mein pehle "Health Benefits" diye gaye hain, jisme swasthya se judi suvidhaon ka varnan hai. Uske baad "Enrollment Form" diya gaya hai, jisme bharti karne ke liye avashyak jankari bharni hoti hai.
